primary_heading.usage: Hero headers, major section titles. Max text-6xl on desktop. Keep it geometric, tight, and massive.

secondary_heading.usage: Used for editorial contrast (e.g., 'Digital Marketing', manifesto chapters, elegant blockquotes). Creates tension against the brutalist geometric sans.

body.usage: All standard paragraphs, card descriptions, and timeline content. Highly legible.

labels.usage: Overlines, tags, category labels on Skills/Certifications.

colors.usage_rules: Never use pure black or white. Limit gradients to small, deliberate moments (e.g., a text-clip gradient on a specific keyword or a subtle glowing border on a highlighted card). Backgrounds should remain solid dark navy (#0F172A) to let the typography and imagery do the heavy lifting.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08) for all cards and section dividers. It creates a technical, 'architectural' feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient glows rather than drop shadows. E.g., hover states can trigger a faint inset glow using the highlight accent: shadow-[inset_0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.1)].
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for the sticky header navigation: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0F172A]/70 with a 1px bottom border. Do not use fully transparent headers.
visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a faint, fixed SVG noise overlay (opacity 2-3%) across the entire site to remove the 'digital flatness' and make it feel like premium print.

component_rules.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary buttons use #F8FAFC (white) background with #0F172A text for extreme contrast. Hover state: scale down slightly (scale-95) with Framer Motion, transition to #CBD5E1. Secondary buttons: transparent with 1px border, text #F8FAFC.
component_rules.cards: Flat surfaces (#273449), sharp or max 8px border-radius (rounded-lg). Strict padding (p-8). Transition background to #334155 on hover. No muddy drop shadows.
component_rules.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Slow, organic drift. Font: Playfair Display, italic, text-5xl, text_muted (#94A3B8). Add wide spacing between items.
component_rules.toast: Use Sonner. Dark mode variant, solid #273449 background, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08).

grids_and_layouts.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Massive typography on the left. Right side features a spotlight-clipped portrait or 3D data visualization.
grids_and_layouts.about_manifesto: Numbered chapters using a two-column grid. Left column: massive Serif number (e.g., '01'). Right column: body text.
grids_and_layouts.skills_bento: Tetris-style Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4). Mix col-span-2 and col-span-1 cards. Some tall (row-span-2). Generous gap (gap-6).
grids_and_layouts.experience_timeline: Vertical line indicator (border-l) on the left. Generous spacing (py-12) between each role. Use typography to establish hierarchy between Job Title and Company.
grids_and_layouts.contact: Two column setup. Left: Giant text 'Let's Build Something'. Right: minimalist mailto form using Shadcn inputs (heavily customized to match the dark surface theme).
grids_and_layouts.spacing_system: Extreme generous spacing. Sections separated by py-32 or py-40. Internal card padding p-8. Tension through negative space.

motion_and_interactions.hero_reveal: Kinetic line-by-line reveal using framer-motion. Wrap lines in overflow-hidden spans, translate y from 100% to 0% with cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1) over 1s.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion `whileInView`. Elements should drift upward (y: 30 to 0) and fade in (opacity 0 to 1). Do not over-animate; stagger children for lists (skills, timeline).
motion_and_interactions.smooth_scroll: Lenis is MANDATORY. Configuration: { lerp: 0.07, smoothWheel: true }. It creates the heavy, premium momentum scroll expected of an Awwwards site.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and change surface color. Images inside cards (if any) zoom slightly (scale-105) while container remains overflow-hidden.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #94A3B8 (muted text) against #0F172A meets APCA standards. If not, lighten it to #CBD5E1 for critical readability.
accessibility.focus_states: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3B82F6] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0F172A] on all interactive elements.
accessibility.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-resume-button', data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='skill-card-seo').

hero_portrait.description: Dramatic, shadowed portrait for the hero section to maintain a premium corporate silhouette vibe.

abstract_data.description: Glowing neon blue optical fibers. Use inside a bento card (e.g., Academic Project or Data Skills) as an image mask or background.

office_vibe.description: Dark luxury modern office. Use as a heavily darkened parallax background in the 'Why Hire Me' or Contact section.

media.treatment: Images must never feel like standard stock. Apply a grayscale filter and tint them blue/navy using CSS blend modes (mix-blend-luminosity or overlay with #0F172A), OR clip them aggressively into sharp geometric shapes (e.g., strict rectangular masks). Keep max height 80vh on mobile.

3d_libraries.hero_moment: Use tsparticles (react-tsparticles). Configuration: slow-moving, sparse network of glowing dots/lines (using the cyan #06B6D4 and violet #8B5CF6 accents). It should sit entirely BEHIND the typography and have a dark vignette over it so it doesn't distract. It represents 'digital networking' and 'SEO data points'.
3d_libraries.alternative: If TSParticles is too heavy, build a CSS/SVG only subtle animated grid background with glowing radial gradients tracing the lines.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: No generic centered layouts. Asymmetry creates tension, and tension is interesting.
Do not use `transition: all`. Target specific properties like `transition-colors`, `transition-transform`.
Inject a subtle SVG noise filter fixed to the background globally to give it a matte, premium texture.
Strictly follow the color hex codes provided. Do not invent new shades outside the provided palette.
For the 'Contact' form, strictly use `mailto:` protocol on submit. No backend API calls.
Embed a 'Resume' button in the hero linking to '/resume.pdf' (can just be a dead link for now, but design the UI beautifully).
Ensure the header navigation ALWAYS has a solid or highly-blurred background; never let it disappear into the page content.
Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid`.
